infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TimeTracker uses your location to auto-track time when you enter places like work.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: TimeTracker uses background location to automatically track time at saved places.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TimeTracker needs photo library access so you can set a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: TimeTracker sends alerts when you arrive at saved places so you can stop tracking if needed.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow TimeTracker to use your location to auto-track time at saved places.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow TimeTracker to use your location on the map and for geofencing.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow TimeTracker to access your photos to set a profile picture.
